mapper.insert: insert into release_issue (release_id, issue_id, task_id, category, notes, added_by, added_at) values (#{releaseId}, #{issueId}, #{taskId}, #{category}, #{notes}, #{addedBy}, #{addedAt})
mapper.update: update release_issue set deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from release_issue where release_id = #{releaseId} and deleted = 0
